creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
FYI, opening a PR to inform of a new version is against PR guidelines:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/problem-reports/pr-when.html

Chances are the maintainer was already aware.
However, it's completely acceptable to write the maintainer directly to confirm and ask politely when a new version would be available.

What is permitted (even encouraged) is submitting a patch that updates the version.  If you really need this updated, then submit the changes and the maintain *has* to react within two weeks.
